tools.name: adventure.candidates
tools.description: Suggest candidate adventures near a location by scoring nearby trails/parks/campgrounds deterministically.

tools.name: adventure.outline
tools.description: Create a structured, day-by-day itinerary outline from selected trail/park/campground IDs or slugs.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search Outdoors (theoutdoorsapp.com) for U.S. hiking trails, parks, campgrounds, and lakes/rivers/reservoirs. Returns a list of results whose ids can be passed to the fetch tool for the full record.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch the full Outdoors record for a search result id (e.g. "trail:bear-lake-loop", "park:rocky-mountain-national-park"). Returns the complete text of the record plus the canonical theoutdoorsapp.com URL for citation.

tools.name: outdoors.ping
tools.description: Health check for the Outdoors MCP server.

tools.name: search.global
tools.description: Global search across trails, parks, campgrounds, and water bodies (uses Meilisearch when available).

tools.name: nearMe.search
tools.description: Aggregate nearby Trails, Parks, and Campgrounds for a map-first exploration experience.

tools.name: trails.search
tools.description: Search public, verified trails with filters (supports map bounds and near-me style geo filtering).

tools.name: trails.get
tools.description: Get a single public, verified trail by id or slug, including nearby trails and breadcrumbs.

tools.name: safety.overview
tools.description: Combined safety overview (weather alerts, AQI, wildfire context) for a location.

tools.name: weather.current
tools.description: Current weather conditions for a location.

tools.name: weather.alerts
tools.description: Weather alerts for a location.

tools.name: aqi.current
tools.description: Current air quality (AQI) for a location.

tools.name: fires.nearby
tools.description: Nearby wildfire incidents for a location.

tools.name: parks.search
tools.description: Search published, verified parks with optional geo and region filters.

tools.name: parks.get
tools.description: Get a single published, verified park by id or slug.

tools.name: campsites.list
tools.description: List campsites for a campground with filters (type, hookups, accessibility, availability, loop).

tools.name: campsites.get
tools.description: Get a single campsite (and its campground/park/region relations) by campground + campsite id.

tools.name: campgrounds.search
tools.description: Search published, verified campgrounds with common filters (type, reservation, region/state, geo).

tools.name: campgrounds.get
tools.description: Get a single published, verified campground by id or slug.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
